message: br-bd-e6rh8 add cli btrfs parser fuzz target

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ edition = "2021"
 cargo-fuzz = true
 
 [dependencies]
+anyhow = "1.0.102"
 asupersync = "0.3.1"
 crc32c = "0.6.8"
 libfuzzer-sys = "0.4"
@@ -239,3 +240,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_por_authenticator"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_por_authenticator.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_cli_btrfs_parsers"
